Home.title: Benjamín Díaz
Home.subtitle: Software Engineer
Home.description: Software Engineer at <microsoft>Microsoft</microsoft>, based in Chile. Passionate about crafting software, making games, and using technology as a creative medium.

bio.heading: Biography
bio.p1: I'm Benjamín, a Software Engineer based in Chile. I currently work at Microsoft. Before that, I worked at startups and security companies, which gave me a broad perspective on how to build products from scratch and ship them fast.
bio.p2: I studied Civil Engineering in Computer Science at Universidad del Bío-Bío. Beyond my day job, I'm passionate about using technology creatively — whether that's developing video games, making music, or creating content about software development.
bio.p3: I believe in building things that matter, writing clean code, and always learning something new. When I'm not coding, you'll find me experimenting with game engines, producing music, or sharing what I learn on YouTube and social media.

gamedev.title: Game Development
gamedev.description: I love creating interactive experiences. I've built games with Unity and C#, handling everything from code to art and music.

music.title: Music Production
music.description: I produce music as a creative outlet, using Logic Pro X and other tools to compose original tracks for my projects and beyond.

content.title: Content Creation
content.description: I share my knowledge and experiences through YouTube, TikTok, and other platforms — from dev tutorials to behind-the-scenes of my projects.

opensource.title: Open Source
opensource.description: I enjoy contributing to and building open source projects. I believe in sharing knowledge and building in public.

insideSecurity.description: Software development for Inside Security's application factory. Implementation of best practices and design and architecture patterns in software repositories. Secure software development.

drizip.description: As a software engineer at Drizip, I helped develop and build the platform's infrastructure from its early stages. Over the years, I individually and as a team implemented many new features for the platform.

ivory.description: I started as a part-time intern during my last year of university. During that time I helped create web platforms and mobile applications for two simultaneous projects.

Contact.title: Contact me
Contact.subtitle: Feel free to contact me if you want to ask me anything or just to say hi.
